name: Roper Technologies
analysis: ROP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 41% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $334.3300, stop $313.6815, target $368.3310 (1.65:1) — then trail it.
